title: Integrate an online QR code
excerpt: Integrate an online QR code in Monday.com

posts.author: james.soileau (James Soileau)
posts.cookedHtml: Integrate an online QR code in Monday.com

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi James! Are you looking to be able to create a QR code in your monday account?

If so, we recommend checking out this app: DocQR code app

Let us know if this works for what you need!

posts.author: tio.escarda (Tio Escarda)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi James. Check out our new app, Q-ARGH! Let’s you generate custom QR Codes for your monday items, or any URL. Also let’s you create custom QR Code labels populated with chosen column data. 14 day free trail available.

Q_ARGH -QR Custom1252×645 65.8 KB

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @james.soileau - Avo here from the Fluid Apps team. You might want to check out QR Item Tracker – it’s built for monday.com and lets you create smart, customizable QR codes for any item. Add logos, labels, PIN protection, and trigger automations with a quick scan.

Here’s a quick comparison with other QR apps on monday.com: Top QR Code Trackers for monday.com

Since we just launched, we’ve got an Early Adopter Program offering 50% OFF any annual plan!

Happy to walk you through it live, just send me a message.

posts.author: mfonb (Mfon Inyang)
posts.cookedHtml: I have used the QR item tracker and it has cool features but i noticed that it does not work on an ios device, particularly when i want to select something from an another board.but it works far better on an android

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for sharing your experience with QR Item Tracker, glad you like the features.

We worked with you @mfonb on this through support earlier. The scanning issue was related to your iOS device running an older version. After updating the iOS, the QR scanning worked as expected.

Our QR Item Tracker has a very high scan success rate across devices, including iOS, and the system recorded the scan working correctly once the device was updated.

If anyone else encounters something similar, we recommend making sure the device OS is up to date. And of course, our support team is always happy to help if needed.

posts.author: DocCreate (FlowTech Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @mfonb ,

Check out the newest app we released this month, QR TRAX, and now available in the marketplace. This will work with both IOS and Android seamlessly.

QR Trax helps operational and field teams capture structured data, verify site activity, and automatically update boards the moment a QR code is scanned.

Key Features

Create Branded QR Codes at Scale
Generate unlimited custom QR codes tied to items, assets, locations, or workflows.

Custom eForms Linked to Each QR Code
Attach fully customized scan forms to capture structured inputs such as status updates, notes, dropdown selections, photos, and files — all mapped directly to monday columns and subitems.

GPS & Address Capture for Verified Scans
Every scan records geo location, timestamp, and street address to create reliable audit trails for inspections, field visits, compliance tracking, and asset verification.

Automatic Board Updates & Subitem Creation
Scanning a code can instantly create records, update item status, log activity history, and trigger automations.

Photo & File Upload from the Field
Capture visual proof and documentation during scans using any mobile device.

Real-Time Scan Tracking & History
Search, audit, and export scan data to maintain operational transparency and reporting accuracy.

Mobile-Friendly Field Workflows
Designed for teams working across sites, facilities, and distributed locations.

Common Use Cases and Many More

Teams are using QR Trax for:

  • Asset and equipment tracking

  • Property and facility inspections

  • Field service visit verification

  • Maintenance workflows and work orders

  • Construction site activity logs

  • Inventory tracking

  • Event and visitor check-ins

QR Trax is built for operational environments including property management, construction, logistics, facilities, and field services.

If you’re looking to connect real-world activity directly to your monday boards, QR Trax can help streamline your workflows.

We’d love feedback from the community and are happy to support new implementations.

— FlowTech Team
